name: Reverend of Rats Hideout
description: An NWoD-leaning loot table for an abandoned church hideout full of disease, intelligence fragments, infiltration tools, and vermin miracles.

item.name: Jar of Chapel Keys
item.notes: A jangling jar of mismatched keys from abandoned churches, basements, and municipal locks.

reward.title: Moldy Confession Ledger
reward.body: Contains names, sins, debts, and blackmail seeds from the neighborhood around the Rat Chapel.

item.name: Rat-Scented Cassock
item.notes: +1 circumstance bonus to blend with derelict clergy, squatters, or vermin cult imagery when plausible.

item.name: Packet of Spoiled Incense
item.notes: Can mask human scent or make a room seem abandoned, sick, or ritually fouled.

reward.title: Chewed Police Report
reward.body: A partial mundane investigation report. One clue survived the teeth.

entries.label: Loose Cash in Offering Box
entries.notes: NWoD-style cash/resources note. Store as custom currency.

item.name: Nest of Burner Phones
item.notes: Mostly functional cheap phones, each with one useful contact or message thread.

item.name: Stained Medical Kit
item.notes: Old but usable medical supplies. Good for one field treatment scene before needing restock.

reward.title: Vermin Trail Map
reward.body: A hand-drawn route of drainpipes, wall gaps, and abandoned service tunnels near the hideout.

reward.title: Blackmail Photograph
reward.body: A compromising photo of a minor official entering the chapel after midnight.

item.name: Powdered Rat-Bone Chalk
item.notes: Used to mark invisible vermin paths or ward a threshold against mundane pests.

condition.name: Nauseated by Rotwine
condition.description: A minor Sickened-style condition after drinking or weaponizing the spoiled sacrament. Resolve through rest or treatment.

reward.title: Whispering Wall Scrap
reward.body: A torn piece of wallpaper covered in tiny bite marks forming half a name.

item.name: Saint of Vermin Icon
item.notes: Once per session, may justify a +2 bonus to command, interpret, or bargain with rats or vermin spirits.

powers.label: Vermin Benediction
powers.description: Command, interpret, or bargain with rats or vermin spirits.

action.label: Vermin Benediction
action.notes: Use the icon to command, interpret, or bargain with rats or vermin spirits.

item.name: Parallel Thought Rosary
item.notes: A crude focus for swarm-mind meditation. Grants +1 to one extended Investigation/Occult roll involving many simultaneous clues.

action.label: Swarm-Mind Focus
action.notes: Use the rosary to organize many simultaneous rat-scout impressions.

entries.label: Plague Vector Notes
entries.notes: Links to the custom Vesper Plague codex entry if present.

item.name: Reliquary of the Many Teeth
item.notes: A grisly relic. Once per story, convert a failed Investigation or Stealth roll involving rats into a dramatic clue at a cost chosen by the GM.

powers.label: Invoke Many Teeth
powers.description: Read the tooth-signs for hidden vermin-borne clues.

action.label: Invoke Many Teeth
action.notes: Use the reliquary to pull a clue through vermin omens.

entries.label: Doctrine of the Swarm-Mind
entries.notes: Links to Many-Eyed Sermon if present.

reward.title: The Reverend's True Name
reward.body: A dangerous secret. Knowing it grants leverage, ritual access, or a direct line into the Reverend's fractured swarm identity.

entries.label: Blessing of the Rat Chapel

condition.name: Blessing of the Rat Chapel
condition.description: For one session, gain a supernatural edge when moving through filth, crowds, ruins, tunnels, or vermin-infested spaces. The GM may also introduce vermin attention as a complication.

actionSuggestions: Dexterity + Stealth + 2 in tunnels, filth, or ruins
Wits + Streetwise + 2 to follow vermin rumor trails

entries.notes: Capstone result added because 13 common + 3 uncommon + 3 rare = 19.
